scripts.predev: pkill -f '@rocicorp/zero/out' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f zero-cache-dev 2>/dev/null; dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'psql "${ZERO_UPSTREAM_DB/sslmode=verify-full/sslmode=require}" -c "SELECT pg_drop_replication_slot(s.slot_name) FROM pg_replication_slots s WHERE s.slot_name LIKE '\''zero_dev_0_%'\'' AND active = false" 2>/dev/null || true'; exit 0
